_comment: SSOT for all MCP surface configs. Run `npm run mcp:sync` to propagate changes to every IDE/tool surface.
_doc: See scripts/sync-mcp-connections.mjs for surface rendering logic and config/mcp-connections.schema.json for full field reference.

servers.name: Activ8 AI Unified MCP
servers.description: 186 tools: Notion, Slack, GA4, Google Ads, GDrive, Gmail, Teamwork, Fathom, BigQuery, GCP, MAOS, PrimeBridge, Governance, Reporting

claude_code_global._note: Unified MCP is the Claude Code system-wide standard. Keep it global and do not duplicate it in project settings.

claude_code_project._note: Project settings should not duplicate the global unified MCP attachment.

cursor._note: Cursor does not expand env vars in headers — token omitted intentionally

claude_desktop._note: Claude Desktop uses npx mcp-remote wrapper — native http type not supported in this version

servers.name: Notion Official MCP
servers.description: Notion workspace read/write via official Notion MCP server

claude_code_global._note: Direct Notion MCP is disabled in the standard Activ8 client surface; use the unified server's Notion tools instead.

codex._note: Codex should route Notion access through activ8_ai_unified as the single standard.

servers.name: MCP Docker Gateway
servers.description: Docker system tools via MCP Docker gateway
